title: diodia subulata
intro: Diodia subulata, also known as Buttonweed or Button Plant, is a perennial herb native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Diodia subulata include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting digestive health. Diodia subulata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for herbal use, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
